title: Unique Tool Retextures
description: A small pack to diversify the appearances of tools!
body:
### ABOUT
This pack aims to make all items in the game feel unique in their own ways. Wood is very shoddy, stone is a little better, iron is more put together, etc. In this way I hope the tools all stand out and match their respective materials in a way that feels close to Vanilla.

Every tool is designed with a theme in mind, as mentioned before, to correspond with the materials used to make them.

### DESIGNS
**Wooden Tools** were made to be particularly not well crafted, being held together by just a little bit of rope.

**Stone Tools** are about being slightly more well forged than their predecessor, as a sign of the player getting their footing in their new world.

**Iron Tools** are a real sign of growth, being sturdy and always ready for the jobs they were made for, with some made to appear very similar to tools often associated with Vikings.

**Gold Tools** are regal, flashy, but really not that durable, and were made after many tools designed by Ancient Romans.

**Diamond Tools** don't try to stray far away from their Vanilla shape, as I wanted them to be recolored to match the look of Vanilla Netherite Tools, with some added tweaks here and there.
Netherite Tools were designed to look strong, loud, and proud, as if they could rip anything to shreds in a matter of moments.

Here are all of the tools, put on display!
![All of the tools, put on display](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0221650bad66074959c35d6bc8f6c161ecf14d2f.png)
